dict.string: QuantClaw needs camera access for photo capture automation.
QuantClaw needs microphone access for voice commands and audio recording.
QuantClaw needs speech recognition for voice transcription.
QuantClaw needs Automation permission to control other applications via AppleScript.
QuantClaw needs Screen Recording to see what is on screen so the agent can act on the current context.
QuantClaw needs Input Monitoring to receive global hotkeys and observe user activity outside its own windows.
